description_long: This is a vintage-style motorcycle or aviator helmet with a rounded, dome-shaped shell made of brown material that shows signs of wear and scuffing, giving it a rugged, used appearance. The helmet features a pair of dark-tinted goggles attached to the front, with a thick, black elastic strap running around the back to secure them in place. A black chin strap with a metallic buckle is visible, designed to fasten the helmet securely under the chin. The lower sides of the helmet have padded ear covers, likely made of fabric or leather, with visible stitching and a button detail. The surface of the helmet is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on the goggles, and there are no visible logos or graphic designs. The overall construction suggests a combination of hard outer shell and softer interior padding for comfort and protection.
description: A worn, brown vintage helmet with attached dark goggles, black chin strap, and padded ear covers. The surface is matte with scuff marks and no visible graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded brown shell, dark goggles, and black chin strap hanging down.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black strap securing the goggles and the padded ear cover with a button.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, scuffed brown shell and the black goggle strap running horizontally.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the ear cover, button detail, and the side profile of the goggles and strap.
